## [00:00 - 00:21]

The puppy dog close. Hey, let me suggest that you go ahead and take it home tonight. We go ahead and get it installed. And when you wake up tomorrow, you decide whether it's the right thing for you to have done or not. If you decide it's not, we come back and pick it up. Then you can bring it back and no problems. At least you will have had the experience of having it in your home.
